Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Aetheric symbols]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 1''' — Aetheric symbols shine over a metal table.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 2''' — Aetheric symbols can be used in a spinning disc to analyze spells.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 3''' — Aetheric symbols can be seen reflected in the Aether during a ritual.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 4''' — Aetheric symbols can form a halo around the Magic Tower.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 5''' — Aetheric symbols are magical signs that must be interpreted by a mage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 8''' — An intricately complex circle of Aetheric symbols flashed in turquoise light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 12''' — Aethril swords can glow with Aetheric symbols.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 16''' — Aetheric symbols can form a white circle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 21''' — Aetheric symbols can be blue-and-red.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 22''' — Aetheric symbols can be used to form spell-circles.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 10''' — Aetheric symbols are etched around the major fabricator and evoke creation and alteration.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 11''' — The narrator notes the absence of Aetheric symbols on the vault.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 11''' — Aetheric symbols were not apparent on Steel Avalanche's uniform.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 17''' — The narrator can sketch Aetheric symbols in the air.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 28''' — Aetheric symbols can appear as a golden swarm during spellcasting.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 36''' — The asteroids in the system were arranged into Aetheric symbols.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 51''' — Aetheric symbols are built into the walls to disturb magic.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 55''' — Aetheric symbols are contained within a shining ball used as a spell-anchor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 55''' — The device in the lab was covered by diagnostics equipment including circles of Aetheric symbols.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 3''' — Aetheric symbols can appear as spinning blue or white circles on ceilings and walls.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 25''' — The columns in the Prime Arena form letters that look like Aetheric symbols.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 30''' — Aetheric symbols were etched into the window.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 37''' — Aetheric symbols are used in spellcasting and can be affected by titanic clashes in the Aether.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 44''' — Aetheric symbols flashed to preserve the pilot within the Titan's protective systems.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 26''' — Mariala's spells wrap around the drive in a golden chain of Aetheric symbols.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 26''' — Aetheric symbols can be used to see a person's future.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 31''' — The mantle Mariala wore had silver Aetheric symbols around the hem.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 35''' — Aetheric symbols can be used to create intricate maps.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 42''' — Aetheric symbols can wear off over time.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 43''' — Archmage Kerathin uses Aetheric symbols to activate magic.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 43''' — Aetheric symbols can be melted away by the attention of magical eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 48''' — Five Aetheric symbols burned into the sky behind Fathom as part of a binding spell.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
